title: malaparius flavus
side_effects: Malaparius flavus can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. Prolonged use or misuse of the plant can also cause liver damage and interact with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can result in dermatitis and respiratory problems due to its potent allergens.
